person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Hugh was born before 4 June, 1225 [he paid homage for his father's lands on 4 June, 1246, so he'd reached his majority by then.

Hugh was the son and heir of Richard Phitun.

A writ to John Lestrange (J Extraneo), Justice of Chester, on 25 May, 26 Henry III [1242], regarding John, earl of Chester, resulted in an Inquisition (date not recorded) at Chester, which found that Rushton manor was given by the said earl of his good will to Hugh Fyton, who was in seisin thereof a great while; afterwards the said earl disseised him, but granted him the manor in tenancy until he should provide him with 20 marks of land; meanwhile the earl died and the king's chief bailiffs in the county and S dean of Chester disseised him, by what order the jury know not.

An inquisition during the reign of Henry III (date not recorded and writ missing), at Chester, regarding Richard Fitun, found Hugh Fitun, knight, was his heir, and Richard held the manor of Bolyn, 2 bovates land and a mill, with the advowson, held of the king in chief by service of coming to the army at Chester with all his household (cum tota familia sua) with horses and arms at the king's expense; and Falinisbrom, held of the king in chief by 3s rent.

On 4 June, 30 Henry III [1246], at Windsor, the king, Henry III of England, having taken the homage of Hugh, son and heir of Richard Phitun, for all the lands and tenements which Richard held of the king in chief, ordered J de Gray, justice of Chester that, having accepted security from the same Hugh for rendering 100s. to the king for his relief, he was to cause him to have seisin of all the lands and tenements of which Richard was seised as of fee on the day he died and which fall to him by hereditary right.

On 29 May, 1253, at Windsor, the king granted to John de Grey the wardship of the lands which Hugh Fytun held in chief in the county of Chester, during the minority of the heirs, on condition that 6l 17s 11½d extent, be deducted from his yearly fee of 50 marks at the Exchequer for this period.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Fitton於1223年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight49歲，母親Ellen fitz Elias45歲。他和Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1253年5月29日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國爾維爾姆斯洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Fitton于1223年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight49岁，母亲Ellen fitz Elias45岁。他和Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1253年5月29日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国爾維爾姆斯洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Fitton was born in 1223, in Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, was 49 and his mother, Ellen fitz Elias, was 45. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce. He died before 29 May 1253, in his hometown, and was buried in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Fitton est né en 1223, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Ellen fitz Elias, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce. Il est décédé avant 29 mai 1253, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Wilmslow, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Fitton 1223 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight 49 und seine Mutter Ellen fitz Elias 45. Er hatte mit Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 29. Mai 1253 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Fitton è nato il nel 1223 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Ellen fitz Elias, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce. Morì prima del 29 maggio 1253, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Wilmslow, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Fittonが1223年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knightは49歳，母Ellen fitz Eliasは45歳であった。彼はLady Ellen Margaret Joyceとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1253年5月29日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアウィルムスロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Fitton(이)가 1223년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen fitz Elias(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 5월 29일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 체실르 윌슬로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Fitton nasceu em 1223, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Ellen fitz Elias, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce. Ele faleceu antes 29 de maio de 1253, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Fitton родился в 1223 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen fitz Elias, 45. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce. Он умер перед 29 май 1253 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности уилмслоу, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Fitton nació en 1223, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Fitton - Lord of Bolyn, Knight, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Ellen fitz Elias, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Lady Ellen Margaret Joyce. Murió antes de 29 de mayo de 1253, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
